subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Be thou not sorrowful, neither be thou grieved, nor fall into despair. Thou art beneath the shadow of His loving-kindness and art the recipient of bounty and grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء محزون مباش مغموم مگرد مایوس مشو در ظل عنایتی و مظهر لطف و موهبت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @poems and quotation from poetry
